name: S-2 low-fragility-tier manual-only strategy refuses under --auto per the architecture refusal contract
command: mkdir -p cache && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\necho x\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id x --fragility-tier low --strategy manual-only --upstream-stub ./up.sh --cache cache --auto 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'manual-only' err.txt && grep -q 'refused' err.txt && echo refused 1>&2
